_meta.purpose: Structured database of all prop firm rules for propfirmbro.com. Built incrementally as Mike supplies official data. Future use: AI assistant to answer trader questions, comparison logic, content generation.
_meta.verified_sources: Mike-supplied screenshots from each firm's official website (pricing, rules, account details).
_meta.pricing_note: Prices in this file reflect propfirmmatch.com display prices (with their MATCH/DASH coupon). Mike's BRO/BROTRADING codes give different (typically better) prices. Prices in the live site comparison.html are NOT authoritative — always verify on firm's own site.

rules_global.hedging: Strictly prohibited (incl across accounts and correlated assets)

best_deal.description: Up to 40% off (Pro/Flex) and 30% off (Direct) with exclusive code BROTRADING via Bro Trading.

leverage._note: For Growth, Select, and Lightning Funded — same leverage table

rules_global.micro_scalping: Trades must be >10 sec; >50% must be longer than 10sec AND >50% profit from longer trades
rules_global.bots_eas: Allowed if sole-owner, exclusive, verified via live video. NO HFT bots

best_deal.description: 40% off all evaluation plans with exclusive code BRO via Bro Trading.

rules_global.automation: Allowed (no exploit of sim fills); CME guidelines for live
rules_global.news_trading_t1: Pro/Rapid Sim funded prohibited ±2min; Flex unrestricted
rules_global.price_limit_rule: No trading within 2% of CME price limit
rules_global.cross_instrument: Single instrument only (e.g., max 2 NQ contracts)

Pro.scaling_rule: None on eval, position grows on funded
Pro.live_transition: After 3 consecutive payouts or $20K profit milestone

best_deal.description: Up to 50% off with affiliate code BRO via Bro Trading (50% on Pro, 40% on Builder/Flex, 20% on Rapid).

rules_global.automation: Strictly prohibited (EAs, AI, bots) — across all account types
rules_global.all_or_nothing: Withdrawing all profits after trailing-balance adjustment = account closure
rules_global.price_limit_rule: No trading within 2% of CME price limit

Zero.no_activation_fee_note: NO ACTIVATION FEE ON ZERO ACCOUNTS

best_deal.description: 20% off all Alpha Futures plans with exclusive code BROTRADING via Bro Trading.

top_one_futures.name: Top One Futures

rules_global.consistency: Varies by plan: Elite 25% on funded, Elite Access 40% on funded (none on challenge), INSTANT Sim Funded 20%, S2F Sim PRO 20%, IGNITE 15%

top_one_futures._status: Auto-extracted from https://toponefutures.com/ on 2026-05-03. Verify before publishing.
top_one_futures._extraction_notes: Discount code ANNIVERSARY: 50% off INSTANT Sim Funded, 40% off Elite/Elite Access/S2F/IGNITE. Elite plan is monthly subscription (price/mo); other plans are one-time fees. Elite Access activation fee equals MSRP per the table; reset fee is 'Only $35' on funded. Elite Access has no daily loss limit ('None!'). For INSTANT Sim Funded 100K/150K, two trailing drawdown values shown ($3,000/$4,000 and $4,500/$6,000) — used the higher value as max_drawdown. Same dual-value pattern for IGNITE 100K/150K. Platforms not specified in HTML. Min payout amount not specified; min trading days to payout: 5 (Elite Access), 10 (S2F, IGNITE). Payout split 90/10 from calculator section ('keep 90%').

best_deal.description: Up to 50% off with promo code ANNIVERSARY (50% on Instant Sim Funded, 40% on most plans). Use affiliate code BRO via Bro Trading link.

apex_trader_funding.name: Apex Trader Funding

rules_global.consistency: 50% (best trading day may not exceed 50% of total profit)

apex_trader_funding._status: Verified May 2026 from Mike's comparison.html canon (BRO 90% off promo).
apex_trader_funding._extraction_notes: Only the rendered states for 25k Rithmic Intraday, 25k Rithmic EOD, and 100k Rithmic EOD were present in HTML. Sizes 50k and 150k are referenced in the picker/menus but their pricing/rules were not rendered in the provided HTML. Vendor variants (Tradovate, Wealthcharts) were not rendered with separate pricing — assumed identical via Rithmic data, but not confirmed. Discount appears as a 'with Coupon Code' price (~90% off MSRP); coupon code text not in HTML. Drawdown for Intraday Trail labeled 'Intraday Trail' tooltip='Intraday Trailing Drawdown' — coded as Trailing. Min payout amount not stated; payout frequency is every 5 trading days. This is the 'New' Apex product line (post March 1, 2026); legacy products excluded.

best_deal.description: Up to 90% off via Bro Trading affiliate code BRO ? Apex runs frequent promos, verify current rate on their site.

phidias.name: Phidias Prop Firm
phidias.discount_text: 80% Off OTP & up to 60% Off Evaluations w/ BROTRADING
phidias._status: Auto-extracted from https://phidiaspropfirm.com/ on 2026-05-03. Verify before publishing.
phidias._extraction_notes: Pricing shown with two values: price-x (struck-through, full) and price-y (discounted, ~80% off for OTP and 60% off for Monthly Evaluation; ratios vary by plan — OTP 50K Fundamental: 580→116 = 80% off, Monthly 50K Fundamental: 164→65.6 = 60% off). The exact discount code/text is not visible in HTML — discount_text is inferred from displayed prices. Daily loss limit is None for all plans. Account types are 'Fundamental' (intraday/futures) and 'Swing' (allows overnight/overweek). Reset fees apply only to monthly Evaluation plans ($40/$64/$104). Activation fees are waived ($0) for OTP plans, $149 (50K/100K) or $169 (150K) for monthly Evaluation. 150K Swing monthly plan was cut off in the HTML so not included. No payout/split/consistency rule data found in this section of HTML.

best_deal.description: 80% off all Phidias evaluation plans with exclusive code BROTRADING via Bro Trading.

daytraders.name: DayTraders
daytraders.discount_text: 85% OFF (widget); also a 90% off popup advertised

rules_global.consistency: 50% during evaluation, 30% on Pro accounts; 20% on S2F; 25% on S2L evaluation, none on S2L Live
rules_global.payout_split: 100% to trader on Pro/Eval accounts; 80/20 on S2L Live accounts

daytraders._status: Auto-extracted from https://daytraders.com/ on 2026-05-03. Verify before publishing.
daytraders._extraction_notes: Discount widget shows 85% OFF countdown banner; popup advertises 90% Off. Discounted prices in HTML imply roughly 85% off MSRP for Trail/EOD/Static evaluations and ~40% off for S2F, ~30% off for S2L plans (S2L Core: $329->$229; Edge: $469->$369; Ultra: $599->$499 — these may be flat $100 off promo). Pro account activation fee is $130 (one-time) on Pro upgrades for Trail/EOD/Static. S2L Live accounts have FREE activation. Profit split: 100% on funded Pro accounts (per marketing); 80/20 only on S2L Live accounts. Min payout amount not specified in HTML. Payout frequency: 8 qualifying days for Pro, 10 for S2F, daily on S2L Live. Platforms: Rithmic data feeds, ONYX (proprietary browser-based), TradingView charts. Consistency rules vary: 50% during eval, 30% Pro, 20% S2F, 25% S2L eval, none on S2L Live.

best_deal.description: 85% off all DayTraders evaluation plans with exclusive code BROTRADING via Bro Trading.

nexgen_pro_trader.name: NexGen Funding
nexgen_pro_trader.discount_text: 20% OFF with code PASS20 — affiliate code BRO
nexgen_pro_trader._status: Auto-extracted from https://thenextgenfunding.com/ on 2026-05-03. Verify before publishing.
nexgen_pro_trader._extraction_notes: Discount displayed in promo bar is 30% off 50K/100K/200K with code PASS30 (April promo); however table shows discounted prices already applied across all sizes (these may reflect a different/standing discount). Profit target for Standard and Rapid is two-phase: P1 then P2 (Standard P1:10%/P2:5%; Rapid P1:8%/P2:5%) — only P1 target stored in profit_target field. Drawdown is described as 'Balance Based Drawdown' (static/balance-based, not trailing). No trading platforms specified on this page (separate Trading Platforms page referenced). No min payout amount or consistency rule disclosed on this page. Fee is refundable with first payout. | POST-PROCESSING: percentage values (target/maxDD/dailyDD) converted to dollars using account_size × pct / 100.

best_deal.description: 20% off with promo code PASS20. Use affiliate code BRO via Bro Trading link for the exclusive Bro Trading rate.

yrm_prop.name: YRM Prop
yrm_prop.discount_text: 40% off with code BRO (Instant Prime); Starter shows promotional pricing without explicit code
yrm_prop._status: Auto-extracted from https://yrmprop.com/ on 2026-05-03. Verify before publishing.
yrm_prop._extraction_notes: Platforms section in HTML is empty (logos rendered via CSS/images). Starter plan shows a 'reset price' separate from initial purchase price; reset prices: $49/$69/$125/$139 for 25K/50K/100K/150K respectively. Starter activation fee shown as $0 (was $99 struck-through). Instant Prime daily loss limits labeled 'Soft Breach' for 50K+; 25K shows 'None'. Min payout amount not stated. Profit split shown as 90% (90/10). Drawdown labeled 'Trailing Max Drawdown' but mode is 'End of Day' — represented as EOD. Discount code YRM40 explicitly visible on Instant Prime cards; Starter cards show promotional pricing without explicit code.

best_deal.description: 40% off Instant Prime accounts with exclusive Bro Trading affiliate code BRO.

fundedseat.name: FundedSeat

legal_entities.name: Cygnus Software Solutions LLC
legal_entities.address: 30 N Gould St Ste 23143, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

rules_global.consistency: Daily 35%/50% tiers; Daily Pro 40%; Sprint no consistency rule shown; Direct 15% biggest-trade rule; Bolt 20% on first payout

fundedseat._status: Verified from official FundedSeat configurator screenshots, May 2026 (Mike-supplied).
fundedseat._extraction_notes: Six plan variants × 3-4 sizes = 21 total variants. All drawdowns 'Drawdown Mode: EOD' per screenshots. Profit target uniformly 6% of account size on Eval plans. Daily plan has TWO consistency tiers (35% and 50%) with different prices but same drawdowns; treated as separate plans in this file. Daily Loss Limit: None on Daily/Daily Pro; on Sprint and Instant only at 50K+ ($1,200-$2,700). BRO discount = MSRP × 0.40 (60% off, per Mike); site default shows MSRP × 0.50 (50% off public). Activation fee free on Eval; activation field for Instant not shown in screenshots.
